backend/main.mo: Motoko actor that stores an array of scores with query function to retrieve a score by ID and shared function to append new scores to the array.
feature_evidence.json: Feature evidence report documenting five implemented game features (endless runner, collectibles, obstacles, difficulty progression, dual controls) with associated files, components, and test IDs.
frontend-file-summaries.txt: JSON-formatted summaries of all frontend source files describing their purpose and functionality in the Shinchan endless runner game.
frontend/index.css: Tailwind CSS configuration with custom CSS variables defining light and dark theme colors using OKLCH color space for the Shinchan-themed UI.
frontend/index.html: HTML entry point with root div and module script tag loading the React application with title 'Shinchan Runner'.
frontend/src/App.tsx: Root React component rendering a React Three Fiber Canvas with orthographic camera, gradient background, Game component, and Toaster for notifications.
frontend/src/components/Background.tsx: Infinite scrolling background component using two textured planes that reposition seamlessly as they scroll left based on game speed.
frontend/src/components/Collectible.tsx: Chocobi chip collectible with floating animation, rotation, horizontal scrolling movement, and callback when moving off-screen.
frontend/src/components/Game.tsx: Main game orchestrator managing game state (start/playing/gameOver), score tracking, spawning logic, collision detection, difficulty progression, and rendering all game entities.
frontend/src/components/GameOver.tsx: Game over screen overlay displaying final score with encouraging message based on score threshold and restart button.
frontend/src/components/Obstacle.tsx: Obstacle component supporting rock and puddle types with appropriate textures and sizes, scrolling horizontally and triggering callback when off-screen.
frontend/src/components/Player.tsx: Shinchan player character with jump physics, gravity simulation, ground/ceiling collision detection, and subtle bounce animation.
frontend/src/components/ScoreDisplay.tsx: HUD component displaying current score in a styled badge positioned at the top center, visible only during gameplay.
frontend/src/components/StartScreen.tsx: React component that renders a full-screen start menu with game instructions (collect chips, avoid obstacles, controls) and a start button. Includes branding footer with caffeine.ai attribution.
frontend/src/hooks/useActor.ts: React hook that manages the ICP backend actor instance using React Query, creating authenticated or anonymous actors based on Internet Identity login state. Invalidates dependent queries when the actor changes.
frontend/src/hooks/useCollectibles.ts: React hook that manages collectible items state with functions to spawn collectibles at random heights, remove them by ID, and clear all collectibles.
frontend/src/hooks/useControls.ts: React hook that handles keyboard (Space/ArrowUp) and mouse click input for jump controls, only active when enabled. Returns control state object with jump, moveUp, and moveDown flags.
frontend/src/hooks/useInternetIdentity.t: React context provider and hook for Internet Identity authentication on ICP, managing login/logout flow, identity state, and AuthClient lifecycle with configurable options.
frontend/src/hooks/useObstacles.ts: React hook that manages obstacle state (rocks and puddles) with functions to spawn obstacles at specific positions, remove them by ID, and clear all obstacles.
frontend/src/hooks/useQueries.ts: React Query hook that fetches a player's score from the backend actor by ID, enabled only when the actor is ready and not fetching.
frontend/src/index.css: Global CSS with Tailwind configuration, custom Shinchan theme colors (red, yellow, orange, blue) using OKLCH color space, and Google Fonts (Fredoka, Bangers) for typography.
frontend/src/main.tsx: Application entry point that sets up React root with QueryClientProvider for React Query and InternetIdentityProvider for ICP authentication, then renders the App component.
frontend/src/utils/collision.ts: Utility function that checks circular collision between player and target objects using distance calculation and size-based radius comparison.
frontend/src/utils/difficulty.ts: Utility function that calculates game speed based on score, progressively increasing from base speed (1) to max speed (3) in increments every 50 points.
frontend/tailwind.config.js: Tailwind CSS configuration with custom Shinchan theme colors, OKLCH color system, extended border radius variables, custom fonts (Fredoka, Bangers), and animation keyframes for accordions.
project_state.json: Project configuration for a Shinchan endless runner game with side-scrolling mechanics, collectible chocobi chips, obstacles, progressive difficulty, dual input controls, and anime-style visual theme. Tracks 8 implemented features, image requirements, and architectural notes for the game.
